channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Cut false positives 85% with this CI security trick
item.description: Cut false positives 85% in CI security scans with policy-as-code — SonarQube 10.5, Snyk 1.1400, Trivy 0.48, GitHub Actions cost dropped 74% to $2,100/month

item.title: Claude Code after 365 days: what actually works
item.description: See 38% faster PR merges and 50% fewer on-call pages using Claude Code in 2026 — real latency, cost, and coverage numbers from 14 repos.

item.title: APIs must die in 2026
item.description: Cut API failure rates 85% by ditching REST in 2026 — idempotency keys, HTTP/3, and callback queues that survive 250 ms latency and 15% packet loss.

item.title: Automate 80% keep 20%: why AI agents still need humans
item.description: Reduce AI agent errors 6x by measuring human-in-the-loop patterns: Option A cuts reversals to 0.04% but costs $7,865/month; Option B saves 4.4x on wages but risks $2,400 in chargebacks.

item.title: Reconciling mobile money: edge cases banks ignore
item.description: The mismatches weren’t large dollar amounts—they were 1 Naira here, 5 Naira there—but they accumulated into a $4,200 variance over a single weekend.

item.title: Drop checklists: AI code reviews that scale
item.description: Cut code review time 65% by replacing static checklists with AI agents that replay production events — concrete GitHub Action + Lambda setup and real failure caught, 2026 benchmarks.

item.title: Which AI wrappers made money in 2026
item.description: Cut AI wrapper failure 65% in 2026 with the 3 wrappers that survived rigorous production testing and cost audits.

item.title: Debug AI agent failures: 4 mistakes most teams miss
item.description: Cut AI agent failures 45% faster by adding prompt diffs, tool-use traces, and reward scores — the 3 artifacts most teams miss in 2026 postmortems.

item.title: Avoid these 4 platforms in 2026 (African devs)
item.description: Which freelance platforms still pay African developers fairly in 2026? Median payout times, fee splits, and dispute win rates for Andela, Toptal, Arc, and Contra.

item.title: 2 AI roles ranked: staff engineer vs manager in 2026
item.description: Cut AI inference spend 60% with the right staff role in 2026 — AI-Architect Advocate beats manager or staff engineer for ROI

item.title: Secure LLM apps: OWASP Top 10 for 2026
item.description: Secure LLM apps in 2026: OWASP Top 10 patterns that stop prompt injection, jailbreaks, and data leakage — with code, benchmarks, and the exact guardrail model to use.

item.title: Skip Stripe in 2026 — I use Lemon Squeezy now
item.description: Save $4k/year and 40 hours of dev time by switching from Stripe to Lemon Squeezy in 2026 — real comparisons, benchmarks, and migration mistakes to avoid.

item.title: AI ate our niche — here’s how we picked a new one
item.description: Cut SaaS churn 74% by pivoting away from AI-vulnerable niches — the compliance automation playbook with latency, cost, and fraud numbers from 2026.

item.title: Self-healing AI agents vs rule-based ops: 40% fewer
item.description: Cut MTTR 83% with self-healing AI agents — real costs, false positives, and the exact Kubernetes manifests to migrate in 30 minutes.

item.title: 3 notification stacks that won’t drown you in
item.description: Cut notification costs 94 % with Nhost+Resend+Gupshup — templates, WhatsApp pricing tiers, and the race-condition mistake that cost $3k in refunds.

item.title: Negotiate 2026 pay when AI steals 40% of your job
item.description: Cut compensation talks 40% faster with GitHub Copilot telemetry — build a CLI, pull 90 days of data, and negotiate using real hours saved in 2026.

item.title: Cut React bundle 62% without rewriting
item.description: That’s what server components give you: the ability to reduce client JS by 60% without touching the UI layer.

item.title: AI interviews broke system design: 3 patterns that
item.description: Latency spiked to 850ms on a 500ms SLA, and the Terraform script it wrote referenced AWS services that don’t exist in us-east-2.

item.title: SLSA 1.0 and Sigstore: why every repo needs them in
item.description: Cut unsigned dependency risk 100% with SLSA 1.0 and Sigstore in 2026 — concrete pipeline, cost, and latency numbers for bootstrappers and Series B teams.

item.title: AWS Lambda replaced Airflow for half our pipelines
item.description: Cut data pipeline costs 68% by replacing Airflow with Lambda + Step Functions — the real AWS bill, latency, and code changes that worked in 2026
